required_skills: Product Thinking and User Empathy in Engineering Decision Making
React or Equivalent Modern JavaScript Framework Proficiency
Performance Optimization and Core Web Vitals Improvement
Cross-functional Collaboration with Product Managers and Designers
A/B Testing and Feature Flag Implementation
Code Review, Engineering Quality Standards, and Technical Documentation
Rapid Prototyping and Iterative Development for Hypothesis Validation
preferred_skills: Experience owning a product area end-to-end from technical architecture through user-facing delivery
Proficiency in backend development using Node.js, Python, or Go for API and service development
Familiarity with analytics instrumentation using Segment, Amplitude, or Mixpanel
Design-to-code fluency including reading Figma files and contributing to design system implementation
Experience with server-side rendering (SSR) and static site generation (SSG) frameworks
Knowledge of growth engineering patterns including referral systems, onboarding flows, and activation experiments
Mobile development experience with React Native or Swift or Kotlin
Database design and query optimization for product feature development
responsibilities: Design, build, and ship user-facing product features end-to-end — owning the full development lifecycle from technical scoping and architecture through implementation, testing, and production deployment
Collaborate closely with product managers and designers in discovery and definition phases, contributing technical feasibility assessments, effort estimates, and alternative solution proposals
Implement and instrument A/B tests and feature flags using tools such as LaunchDarkly, working with growth and data teams to validate product hypotheses and measure experiment impact
Build rapid, functional prototypes to test product concepts with users before committing to full engineering implementation, balancing speed with sufficient fidelity for valid user feedback
Translate Figma design specifications into high-quality, pixel-accurate, accessible front-end implementations using React and TypeScript that faithfully reflect the product design system
Instrument product events, user properties, and funnel tracking using analytics tools such as Segment and Amplitude to provide the data layer required for product decision making
Optimize application performance against Core Web Vitals and page load benchmarks, identifying rendering bottlenecks, unnecessary re-renders, and network inefficiencies that degrade user experience
Participate actively in code reviews, contribute to front-end engineering standards, and advocate for engineering practices that balance product velocity with long-term code maintainability
Integrate third-party APIs, SDKs, and services into the product, evaluating build-vs-buy trade-offs and managing vendor integration quality and reliability
Partner with design systems engineers to consume, contribute to, and evolve the shared component library, ensuring new product features leverage and extend existing system components correctly
